RIMA ALSHOUFI
Work About Connect

CREATIVE DIRECTOR

Designing Luxury, Shaping Emotion, and Inspiring Innovation

My expertise bridges retail architecture, brand identity, and creative leadership. I focus on delivering immersive retail environments, strategic brand storytelling, and high-impact team direction, ensuring every project connects emotionally while achieving business goals.

Expertise

Retail Architecture

  • Large-scale retail design and rollout execution
  • Customer journey mapping, spatial storytelling, and sensory engagement
  • Luxury detailing, zoning, and immersive pop-ups

Strategic Brand Identity

  • Building brand worlds through narrative and luxury positioning
  • Directing cohesive aesthetics across spatial and graphic systems
  • Leading campaigns and activations that embody brand essence

Creative Leadership

  • Strategic planning with clear timelines and KPIs
  • Cross-functional team leadership and workflow optimization
  • Inspiring and guiding high-performing creative teams

Luxury Events

  • Immersive spatial design for high-end events and galas
  • Concept development for corporate activations and exhibitions
  • End-to-end creative direction and production oversight
Experience
2024 — Present

Creative Director

Mohamad Hilal Group

Led the creative strategy, brand building, and campaign execution across a portfolio of luxury retail, fragrance, and F&B brands. Directed multidisciplinary teams and cross-functional partners to align design, storytelling, and customer experience with commercial goals across all brand touch points.

2022 — 2024

Design Manager

Mohamad Hilal Group

Led the in-house design and architectural department for MHG's multi-sector portfolio across luxury retail, F&B, commercial, and residential spaces. Collaborated directly with the CEO to restructure the design division, implement strategic systems, and elevate brand-aligned spatial and visual standards.

2018 — 2022

Design Manager / Director

Catalina Interior Décor

Led the design department across commercial, residential, hospitality, and F&B projects throughout the UAE. Oversaw full project lifecycles from concept to site execution while managing client relationships, creative teams, and stakeholder coordination.

2014 — 2018

Senior Designer

CWAP

Worked across multiple creative divisions including media, print, editorial, and spatial design. Delivered 3D concepts, visual branding, and editorial graphics for clients and internal publications.
